title: 3d Rotating Crystals
description: Resource pack/template for making rotating 3d crystals as a pack
body:
# Hero's Spinning 3d End Crystals 
## What does it do?
- Adds 3d spinning crystals [with shaders] as a pack. Can be used as a template to be edited into other packs. 
 **!! Please give credits for this, took a long time to get this working on 1.21**

## Is this allowed?
- Allowed everywhere, as it's purely cosmetic!
- Confirmed with vanilla tl staff, USpvp, and more!
- Does not give ANY advantage

## How to use?
- Works in **vanilla** minecraft for 1.21+
- Works in most fabric modded cases that don't have incompatibilities [listed under Compatibility]

## I want to change the crystal entity texture and/or the item texture
- The entity texture is NOT linked to the item texture, feel free to change with another pack
- The item texture will be needed to be edited from the 
```
assets/minecraft/textures/item/end_crystal.png
```
 so the image falls into the same places. DO NOT edit the slightly transparent parts (red/orange/yellow squares), those are necessary for the crystal to render correctly.

## Compatibility
- Incompatible [currently] with all beta releases of sodium 0.6.0 or higher - as given in the incompatibilities in the version
- Also incompatible with the mods model gap fix [which can be done with a pack. I personally would use vanilla tweaks's Item Stitching Fix *Under fixes and consistency*
- and incompatible with Legendary Tooltips *(crashes game because the little renderer inside of it just hates custom rendered items)*



## Contact Me:
Any problems, questions, help:
https://discord.gg/4ta7pM4bnr
Let me know if there are any more incompatibilities in my discord!
